title: GRIEF RELEASE - 211info
text: ROLLING HILLS COMMUNITY CHURCH GRIEF RELEASE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a 5-week grief class led by a nationally certified Bereavement Facilitator. Four sessions per year. 3550 SW Borland Road Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who have experienced any type of loss; a loved one through death or divorce, a job, a relationship, reputation, self-esteem, health, identity, etc. Hours: Thursday 6:30pm-8:30pm Email (503) 638-5900 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 638-5900 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: $30 for the 5-week series DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Community resources are located on the lower level, east (left) side of the building. Services: Bereavement and Grief Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOPE'S TABLE FOOD - WASH & WORSHIP MUTUAL SUPPORT - CELEBRATE RECOVERY MUTUAL SUPPORT - DIVORCE CARE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - POP IN PLAY DATE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROLLING HILLS COMMUNITY CHURCH
